system.description:
Misplaced Fortune

The final will and testament of the clan's patriarch included a 24 hour locked-house condition. Survivors would split the inheritance. Darayl Helsman left the house at the end of the time with a small bag. Explorers found nothing but corpses in the house, the inheritance was gone. Darayl was found dead the next day, the bag gone. The city locked the house and guards against trespassers.

Surely Darayl hid the inheritance in the Ghost Field. Find the ghost key and lock in the house, and get it all! Or, did someone else already get it?
